---
title: "Predicting drug responses of unseen cell types through transfer learning with foundation models"
author: 
- Wang
- Liu
- Fan
- et al.
publication: "Nat Comput Sci, **6**, 39–52 (2026)"
categories: 
  - external-publication
  - genomics
url_source: https://doi.org/10.1038/s43588-025-00887-6
url_preprint: 
journ: "Nat Comput Sci"
issue: 6
page: 39–52
year: 2026
image: ""
pub_number: 
doi: 10.1038/s43588-025-00887-6
---
